violations.text: Observed establishment lacking allergy statement at self-service area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -PIC washed, rinsed and sanitized can opener at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Following items were observed at 47-55 degrees Fahrenheit: -whipped butter -whipped cream cheese -jams -oatmeal -chia pudding Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. -Per interview of PIC, foods were put out on the self-service area for about an hour prior to this inspection. -Proper cold hold reviewed. -Staff elected to dispose of the oatmeal, chia pudding, butter, cream cheese, and jams during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Oatmeal and chia pudding were observed at 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit and covered with a lid. Per PIC, oatmeal and chia pudding were prepared 1 hour prior to this inspection. -Proper cooling methods reviewed. PIC moved oatmeal and chia pudding to freezer to allow for rapid cooling during this inspection. -Establishment shall keep a cooling log for foods in cooling process. -Cooling log must be completed and provided to inspector upon the next re-inspection date. -Cooling log provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
